test_cases.name: create_author_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new author can be created with valid data including optional fields.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating an author without the required 'name' field returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing author can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a non-existent author returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_not_modified
test_cases.description: Verifies that a conditional GET with a matching ETag returns 304 Not Modified.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: update_author_with_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating an author with a stale ETag returns 412 Precondition Failed.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that an author with no associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Verifies that deleting an author with associated books returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_category_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new category can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_duplicate_category
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a category with a duplicate name returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new book can be created with valid data including all required fields.

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a 409 Conflict.

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_author_id
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a book with a non-existent author_id returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that an existing book can be retrieved by ID.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that retrieving a soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone.

test_cases.name: update_book_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be updated with valid data.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a book can be soft-deleted.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that restoring a non-deleted book returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that a discount can be applied to a book published more than 1 year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that applying a discount to a book published less than 1 year ago returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_rate_limit_exceeded
test_cases.description: Verifies that exceeding the rate limit for discount requests returns a 429 error.

test_cases.name: update_stock_valid_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that the stock of a book can be updated with a valid quantity.

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient_quantity
test_cases.description: Verifies that updating stock to a negative value returns a 400 error.

test_cases.name: upload_valid_cover_image
test_cases.description: Verifies that a valid cover image can be uploaded for a book.

test_cases.name: upload_unsupported_file_type
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading an unsupported file type returns a 415 error.

test_cases.name: upload_oversized_file
test_cases.description: Verifies that uploading a file larger than 2MB returns a 413 error.

test_cases.name: create_review_valid_data
test_cases.description: Verifies that a new review can be created for a book with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_review_on_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies that creating a review on a soft-deleted book returns a 410 error.
